title: Wild Wasteland
description: A moderately challenging loot and shoot focused modpack in a post collapse modern environment
body:
Inspired by Fallout, Underrail, and dreams of the apocalypse, Wild Wasteland aims to create a fun survival and looting mod with a core focus around Scorched Guns 2.

Featuring custom world generation, you can hop right into a new world ready for a cohesive and bleak experience. Scavenge through the cities covering the surface and craft weapons ready to take out the nightmare hordes lurking in the dark.

Featuring Create and Immersive engineering for when you're ready to reforge civilization.

This is my first modpack and I am open to additional mods to add for fun and challenge as well as of course critique. The initial release is focused on overworld gameplay though I would like to see about improving the nether and end experience as well.

**Getting Started**
Health regeneration in this requires both water and food, you'll be able to purify water with repeated bonfire use of dirty water bottles, but should consider getting this process automated with the tools at your disposal.

**NOTE**
The world generation makes the Jungle Temple, Woodland Mansion, and some of the biome variants of villages impossible to generate, along with a few of the structures found in the mods used. Using the locate structure command can cause a soft freeze on the game if a structure that didn't generate is entered. This is a documented bug --- https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-269520

It is recommended to use at least 4096mb of allocated memory during gameplay to avoid system issues.
